name: Add and Update Afterpay Widgets
body:
[{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Important","bold":true},{"text":": The following steps are not required for new installations of Afterpay; the widgets are added automatically as part of the payment method setup. You will only need to generate your widget code and add your referral keys to activate the widgets."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Generate Afterpay Widgets"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Navigate to "},{"type":"a","url":"https://can01.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fhub.afterpay.com%2Fau&data=05%7C02%7Cmia%40maropost.com%7C27ee9de1d98744fce36808de4f1af753%7Ce5e528371e604135adf7d03a14924196%7C0%7C0%7C639035174426290731%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=jgbIXfuxl27WIFdk8MG4xptcAMQwWCG%2FMumXrJmfsD0%3D&reserved=0","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"https://hub.afterpay.com/au"}]},{"text":" and log in using the "},{"text":"email address","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"password","bold":true},{"text":" you used when setting up your Afterpay account."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click on the "},{"text":"Implementation Guide","bold":true},{"text":" tab and scroll down to the "},{"text":"Code Snippet","bold":true},{"text":" sections for the Product and Cart Widgets."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Take note of your personal Afterpay "},{"text":"MPID","bold":true},{"text":" and the "},{"text":"Placement IDs","bold":true},{"text":" for both widgets. These are displayed as the 'data-mpid' and 'data-placement-id' values, respectively, in the code snippets; you will need these for later. You do not need to copy the entire code snippet contents, only the values specified above (do not include the double quotes around the values)."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/GYGAQUQ4Z111/afterpay0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/GYGAQUQ4Z111/afterpay0.png","name":"afterpay0.png","type":"image/png","size":177008,"width":1165,"height":977,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FGYGAQUQ4Z111%2Fafterpay0.png","active":true,"mediaID":1825,"dateInserted":"2026-01-09T07:55:15+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"If you wish to customise your Afterpay widgets at all, please refer to "},{"type":"a","url":"https://developers.afterpay.com/afterpay-online-developer/guides/afterpay-messaging/implementation#customizing-messaging","children":[{"text":"Afterpay’s documentation"}]},{"text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Locate Custom Script"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"From the Control Panel menu, navigate to "},{"text":"SETTINGS & TOOLS > All Settings & Tools","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"From the left-hand submenu, select "},{"text":"Analytics & 3rd Party Scripts","bold":true},{"text":" OR Type "},{"text":"Custom Scripts","bold":true},{"text":" in the keyword search field at the top of the page."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Open your existing "},{"text":"Afterpay","bold":true},{"text":" custom script by clicking the Name or ID.
